risk_summary: Political and Governance risk rating has improved from Substantial at project approval to Moderate at current review, indicating reduced political instability or governance fragility affecting project implementation.
evidence_quote: Political and Governance [Risk Category Rating at Approval: Substantial, Previous Rating: Moderate, Current Rating: Moderate]

risk_summary: Economic slowdown has negatively impacted tax-to-GDP ratio achievement, with actual performance (9% in FY23) significantly below the end target (17%), indicating macroeconomic fragility is affecting project outcomes.
evidence_quote: Total national tax to GDP was 10% in FY22, and 9% (estimated) in FY23. FBR has collected PKR.6,143 billion during FY22, and PKR. 7,200 billion in FY23 (revised estimates). Tax to GDP ratio was affected by economic slow down, as per Economic Survey of Pakistan for FY 2022-23.
